channel.title: grammar on faŋtrəntrəŋ-pages
channel.description: Recent content in grammar on faŋtrəntrəŋ-pages

item.title: verb
item.description:
5种

一般动词(实意)

系动词(联系):am,is,are,was,were

情态动词(建议,能力,可能性):can and could;may and might;must and should;will and would

使唤动词(让别人做):make;have;get;let

助动词(表达时态,语态,否定):do;does;did;be;have;will
